result: The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script loaded all 9 wave files from data/input/, merged them using full_join by NSID, standardized missing value codes according to the metadata specifications, and created a time-invariant sex variable that prioritizes the most recent valid response (from age 32) falling back to earlier waves. The output file data/output/cleaned_data.csv contains 16,111 observations with 2 variables (NSID and sex factor with labels: Male, Female, Refusal, Don't know, Not applicable, Not asked).
